name: Can Roca
summary: The Roca family's original neighborhood restaurant is a practical weekday Girona lunch or breakfast-of-the-fork option with real local pedigree.
whyItMatters: It gives the trip a grounded Girona food experience connected to the Can Roca family without the near-impossible reservation burden of El Celler.
pros: Official site lists weekday bar, breakfast, and menu-del-dia service
Strong story value as the Roca family home restaurant opened by their parents in 1967
cons: Weekday-only schedule makes it unusable for weekend Girona time
Not in the old-town core, so it needs a deliberate taxi, bike, or car move

logistics.opening_hours: Restaurant/menu diari Monday-Friday 13:00-15:30; esmorzars de forquilla Monday-Friday 8:30-10:30; bar Monday-Friday 6:30-17:00.
logistics.reservation_needed: Recommended for lunch; reserve by phone per official site.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until lodging is confirmed; on Ctra. Taiala north-west of central Girona.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not a race-day viewing food option.
logistics.transit: Unknown; likely easiest by taxi, bike, or car from central Girona.
logistics.road_closure_notes: No race-day closure information found for this specific restaurant.

timing.best_visit_window: Weekday breakfast or lunch while based in Girona.
timing.race_day_risk: Low for non-race Girona days; closed weekends.
